title: justicia neotinctoria
intro: Justicia neotinctoria, also known as the Mexican honeysuckle or Justicia, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia neotinctoria include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Justicia neotinctoria typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
